message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client" as Client
participant "OAuth" as OAuth
participant "Login Endpoint" as LoginEndpoint
participant "Consent Endpoint" as ConsentEndpoint

section Open page
    Client -> OAuth : Initiate authorize code or implicit flow
    OAuth -> Client : No user session (not authenticated)
    Client -> LoginEndpoint : Redirect to login endpoint with <login_challenge>
    LoginEndpoint -> Client : GET https://<LOGIN_ENDPOINT>/login?login_challenge=7bb518c4eec2454ddb289f5fdb4c0ee2
end section

section Login
    Client -> LoginEndpoint : Input user/password
    LoginEndpoint -> OAuth : Verify user/password
    OAuth -> LoginEndpoint : Fetch login request info with <login_challenge>
    LoginEndpoint -> OAuth : PUT http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/login/accept?login_challenge=<challenge>
    LoginEndpoint -> OAuth : {
        "acr": "string",
        "context": {},
        "force_subject_identifier": "string",
        "remember": true,
        "remember_for": 3600,
        "subject": "string"
    }
    OAuth -> LoginEndpoint : Accept login
    LoginEndpoint -> Client : Return redirect url
    Client -> LoginEndpoint : Redirect
end section

section Consent
    Client -> OAuth : First time that client asks user for permission
    OAuth -> Client : Redirect with <consent_challenge>
    Client -> ConsentEndpoint : Fetch consent info
    ConsentEndpoint -> Client : GET http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/consent?consent_challenge=<challenge>
    ConsentEndpoint -> Client : PUT http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/consent/accept?consent_challenge=<challenge>
    ConsentEndpoint -> Client : {
        "grant_scope": ["openid", "offline_access"],
        "handled_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        "session": {
            "access_token": {
                "foo": "This field will be available when introspecting the Access Token"
            },
            "id_token": {
                "bar": "This field will be available as a claim in the ID Token"
            }
        }
    }
    Client -> OAuth : Accept
    OAuth -> Client : Return redirect url
    Client -> Client : Redirect page
@enduml
